docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2026 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY LOPEZ, ABRAHAM SAN FRANCISCO ANIMAL MEDICAL CENTER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ABRAHAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO ANIMAL MEDICAL CENTER DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF ZERO. DEFENDANT PERFORMED SERVICES PURSUANT TO THE CONTRACT THAT PLAINTIFF AGREED TO. AGREEMENT DISCLOSED RISK AND SURVIVAL RATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-06-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $76.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO ANIMAL MEDICAL CENTER

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NICOLE RAMIREZ, CLIENT SERVICE MANGER, AND EVAN HENDRICKSON, HOSPITAL DIRECTOR AND PARTNER. FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO ANIMAL MEDICAL CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-02-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. PLAINTIFF ABRAHAM LOPEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO ANIMAL MEDICAL CENTER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NICOLE RAMIREZ, CLIENT SERVICE MANAGER & EVAN HENERICKSON, HOSPITAL DIRECTOR & PARTNER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, ABRAHAM AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO ANIMAL MEDICAL CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2026 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
